content.en:
The Hidden River.

After Ye Tian came here, he immediately entered the hidden river.

Soon, he discovers that the Bone Transformation Realm that hunts treacherous creatures here doesn't know him.

"Sure enough, many of the bone transformation realms have a lot of information, and they know that there are the most treacherous here, so they came here. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, everyone does not interfere with each other.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian kept attacking, bombarding and killing the monsters one by one, and while bombarding and killing, he also refined the monster beads in their bodies.

Gradually, Ye Tian's physical body became stronger and stronger.

Finally this day.

Rumble!!

Ye Tian's physical body began to transform.

After a long time, the metamorphosis was completed.

At this time, he knew that he could cast the Ancient Technique, but he couldn't cast the Ancient Technique for a long time, but his strength had also changed dramatically.

At his current strength, the Canghe Realm is not big.

"Gotta snatch the Canghe Pearl!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Somewhere in the Canghe realm.

A Bone Transformation Realm had just obtained a Canghe Pearl, and was chased and killed by a group of Bone Transformation Realms.

Thundered!!!!

Fighting broke out constantly.

And their battle directly affected the countless creatures in the surrounding territory.

Every time the bone transformation realm enters the Canghe realm, the Canghe realm is almost like ushering in the extinction of the world, and after countless years, a new batch of creatures will be born here, and so on.

Seeing that he was about to be killed, this bone transformation realm directly threw out a Canghe bead.

So, this group of people began to snatch the Canghe pearl.

Wow!

A figure emerged and directly grabbed Canghezhu.

Other bone transformation realms tried to snatch it, and they were directly killed by several bone transformation realms in one move.

"Ancient God Demon Spear!"

After a spear pierced and killed several bone transformation realms in seconds, the faces of the other bone transformation realms changed drastically, and they didn't dare to make a move.

This person is Ye Tian.

Swish!

Ye Tian left quickly, and no one dared to intercept him.

This is strength suppression!

"Damn, I actually met an ancient-level genius who can perform the primeval technique, this guy's strength has improved too fast, and his physical body can support the casting of an ancient technique, and it is also the top primordial technique!"

With such a bone transformation realm, he didn't dare to provoke it!

Even if he is strong in the outside world, here, he is not the opponent of the other party.

......

Time flies.

In the following years, there were frequent fights in the Canghe Realm, and every discovery of Canghe Beads had to cause a fight.

Even, if you have a bone transformation realm that suspects that you have Canghe Zhu, he will directly kill you, even if he kills you by mistake?

And Ye Tian relied on his strength, so he didn't have anything to do.

Gradually, there were fewer and fewer bone transformation realms in the Canghe Realm.

Outside the Canghe boundary.

A bone transformation realm who had just been killed said angrily: "Who killed me, I snatched two Canghe beads, and I was killed!!!"

This Bone Transformation Realm is a boundary-breaking genius of the Sixth-Time Bone Transformation Realm, his strength is comparable to that of the Seventh-Time Bone Transformation Realm, and his combat power is absolutely strong.

However, in the Canghe Realm, he was still killed.

"Two Canghe beads!"

Ye Tian thought to himself, just now he seemed to have obtained two Canghe Beads in the Canghe Realm, and it seemed that the guy he had just killed was the reincarnated body of this sixth-time Bone Transformation Realm Breaking Genius.

But the reincarnated body erases the previous breath, and the body is not one's own, so naturally no one knows anyone.

Therefore, he was not worried that this bone transformation realm would find trouble for himself.

Suddenly.

The Lord of Xuanchen smiled bitterly and said, "My reincarnated body was also killed, it's a pity!"

Immediately, he looked at Ye Tian, "Endless Lord, how is your reincarnated body?"

"Alive!"

Ye Tian did not reveal the situation of his reincarnated body, after all, when it came to Canghe Zhu, no one would reveal a little information.

And the Lord of Xuanchen also knew this, so he didn't ask much.

Time passed slowly, and more and more bone transformation realms were eliminated.

Some are still here, some are gone.

Gradually.

There are not many bone transformation realms in the Canghe Realm that are still alive, and they are basically very powerful, or their life-saving ability is very strong.

On this day, the Canghe Realm was shaken, which meant that the Canghe Realm was about to be closed again.

If you don't come out in time, you won't be able to get out.

"It's time to go!"

Ye Tian's consciousness returned, wrapping the Canghe beads he had obtained and returning.

Rumble!!!

A venerable bone has returned.

And the bone transformation realm that these wills return to was naturally noticed by other bone transformation realms.

But they didn't know how many Canghe Beads each Bone Transformation Realm had obtained.

"Lord of Endless, be careful. "

The Lord of Xuanchen reminded Ye Tian, and then took his leave.

There was no way, Ye Tian might have obtained the Canghe Pearl, and he might be targeted, so he could only choose to leave.

Otherwise, he will be targeted.

If he also obtained the Canghe Pearl, it would be fine if he was targeted, but if he didn't get it, it wouldn't be worth the risk.

Therefore, he could only remind Ye Tian.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

When he left the Bone Transformation Realm, he had to prepare to leave.

Wow!

He immediately unleashed the top primeval technique, the primeval realm technique!

Suddenly, his speed became incomparably fast, no less than the ordinary speed of the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm.

Meanwhile.

He swallowed Canghe beads directly on the way to impact the last bottleneck.

This time, he obtained a total of twenty-three Canghe Beads, which was definitely enough for his breakthrough.

He was also to prevent someone from attacking him, so he directly hit the four bone transformation realms.

Meanwhile.

He also had a preparation to replace himself with another replica body of his own.

Wow!

Ye Tian's other copy body moved forward and shuttled according to his original route.

And another Eternal True Beast copy body appeared, and directly swallowed the copy body with Canghe beads in one gulp.

Then they exchanged hands for a while, and then continued to leave.

This scene was too fast, even if there were seven bone transformation realm tracks in the back, I didn't know what was happening.

As for an Eternal True Beast of the Three Bone Transformation Realm, they wouldn't care too much, let alone probe the situation in the Eternal True Beast's body, they would only track Ye Tian's other copy body!

......

"There's really a bone transformation realm tracking over. "

Ye Tian didn't know what the strength of the other party was, so he could only run away as soon as possible.

Rumble!!!!

The other party finally arrived, and it was a sixth-time bone transformation realm Heavenly Ancestor.

The other party didn't say a word, and shot directly at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian immediately counterattacked and cast the Ancient God Demon Spear.

"It's you, you were the one who killed me in the Canghe Realm before!"

This Bone Transformation Realm recognized Ye Tian's Ancient God and Demon Spear, because this top-notch Ancient Technique was the same, and the possibility of being other Bone Transformation Realms was not high.

And Ye Tian was not afraid of being discovered, so he fought with the other party.

However, his current strength is still not as good as the real Six Bone Transformation Realm.

Therefore, after a few moves, he was hit hard.

Soon, his replica body was killed.

"Damn, there is no Canghe Pearl, how is this possible, he obviously killed me before, and I obtained one in the Canghe Realm? Could it be that he threw it away later?"

Immediately, he thought about it for a moment, and felt that there was something wrong with the Eternal True Beast, and wanted to go back and find it.

However, he can't find it now.

......

"Lord of the Yuan Capital, dare to kill me with a copy body, and after I break through, I will trouble you!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to break through in earnest.
